stemHtml: During an ILS procedure, if the reported RVR / visibility is less than the applicable minima, the approach shall not be continued…

options.a: Below 1000 ft above the aerodrome or into the final approach segment if DA/H is more than 1000 ft above the aerodrome.
options.b: Beyond the middle marker, or 500 ft above the aerodrome/heliport if there is no middle marker.
options.c: Below the FAF, or 1500 ft above the aerodrome/heliport if there is no FAF.
